titles.title: God Is Greater Than the Need

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know from where you're standing That mountain seems too high to climb And the valley you just came through Has made you wonder why Before you loose faith just think about His grace You'll find it's more sufficient so believing He'll make a way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is greater than the need Bigger than the problem No matter how bad it seems I know that He can solve it, Just trust Him and believe He can do anything For He's greater, He is greater than the need.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Unanswered questions you've stored back in your mind And the smile you wear was only but there To disguise the pain inside But this ain't the first trial and you know it won't be the last So if you have made it before you can make it again Just keep going and don't look back.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just trust Him and believe He can do anything For He's greater, He is greater than the need
